output.summary: Classified as heavyweight: crosses all system boundaries (frontend, backend, server, game, scripts, config), 4+ parallel work areas, needs multi-agent coordination. Not strategic — approach is clear (find and remove dead code).
No existing checkpoint found. Fresh start.
Read directive.md. Codebase cleanup after 100+ iterations — audit all files for dead code, unused imports, stale types, orphaned files across frontend, server, game, scripts, config.

Read vision.md, all lessons (orchestration, agent-behavior, state-management, skill-design), agent registry, active directives. Cataloged all 100+ source files across src/, server/, scripts/, mcp-server/. Git status shows massive churn with many D (deleted) files already staged.
Challenge inlined into COO planning prompt (default for non-controversial heavyweight). CEO explicitly requested this cleanup — no controversy.
